prompt: The Builder does not validate required fields before building. What is the bug?
choices: setAge should return void, not PersonBuilder
build() does not check that required field name is set; it silently produces 'null, age 30'
name must be declared static to be accessible in build()
The Builder pattern requires a separate Director class
explanation: name is never set, so it remains null. String concatenation with null produces the string 'null', yielding 'null, age 30' — silently wrong. Fix: add a null check in build(): if (name == null) throw new IllegalStateException("name is required");
